title: anil grata
intro: Anil grata, also known as Agarwal's plant, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of anil grata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, while also providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological problems. Anil grata is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or oil, which can be used both internally and externally for therapeutic purposes.
